creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204220
davmail 5.2.0 patch

I took the patch from jjuanino@gmail.com and updated it to the davmail v5.2.0 release along with some pkg-plist changes found in poudriere.

A quick run works for me, but I have only just started testing davmail and am not doing anything complex with it at the moment.
